title: 5 Steps to Base4NFDI Service Integration – A Guide for NFDI Consortia
author: Tatscheck, Jana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This document provides guidance to support NFDI consortia in integrating the Base4NFDI basic services into their service portfolios, by suggesting a 5 step roadmap and templates. 
 To provide feedback, please send an e-mail to the Base4NFDI Office ( base4nfdi-office@lists.nfdi.de ) and the Service Stewards ( base4nfdi-servicestewards@lists.nfdi.de ).
steps_raw:
This document provides guidance to support NFDI consortia in integrating the Base4NFDI basic services into their service portfolios, by suggesting a 5 step roadmap and templates. 
 To provide feedback, please send an e-mail to the Base4NFDI Office ( base4nfdi-office@lists.nfdi.de ) and the Service Stewards ( base4nfdi-servicestewards@lists.nfdi.de ).
